title: ranunculus ficaria f. dentatus
intro: Ranunculus ficaria f. dentatus, also known as Creeping Buttercup, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting infections. The health benefits of Creeping Buttercup include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Creeping Buttercup can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as creams and ointments, to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
